summary: Ran backend + frontend regression for admin shell redesign and chatbot comparator on public preview URL. Core requested flows pass (login, dashboard, sidebar routing, chatbot generate/comparator, users page, documents page load), with one intermittent login integration failure observed once in browser (502 on /api/auth/login causing JSON parse error in UI). No APIs were MOCKED.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 observed once from browser run (not reproduced in pytest); indicates upstream/proxy transient instability.

ui_bugs.issue: When /api/auth/login returns non-JSON error body (observed 502 HTML once), the UI shows raw parse error text: 'Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON'.

integration_issues.issue: One transient failure due to 502 response on /api/auth/login from browser path; retry succeeded.

action_items: Harden LoginForm error handling: guard response parsing by content-type and fallback to generic message when response is not JSON.
Investigate intermittent /api/auth/login 502 at gateway/proxy layer and add monitoring/retry strategy for admin auth path.
Optional UX: show loading state for chatbot conversation list to avoid perceived empty state before async fetch completes.
critical_code_review_comments: LoginForm assumes every auth response is JSON; this creates user-facing parse errors on HTML/502 responses.
backend/server.py remains very large (>1000 lines), increasing risk for future regressions; split proxy/auth/chatbot/AI modules.
Comparator implementation and data-testid coverage are strong and testable; keep this standard for upcoming users/documents feature expansion.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all requested core flows passed; 1 transient login integration failure observed once)

seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_cmp_* chat sessions through /api/chat/message for comparator validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://greeters-ssr.preview.emergentagent.com with admin credentials provided. Chatbot comparator verified by selecting a conversation and triggering generate draft; historical and generated panes rendered. /admin/users loaded with 3 rows. /admin/documents loaded successfully with table/card and count displayed (rows can be 0 depending on data). Keep an eye on intermittent /api/auth/login 502 from browser path.
rca of the issue: Observed once during UI run: browser console logged 502 for /api/auth/login; login form then attempted response.json() and surfaced raw JSON parse error in UI. Backend pytest and subsequent UI retry succeeded, suggesting intermittent upstream/proxy failure plus brittle frontend error parsing. Mitigation: resilient non-JSON handling in LoginForm + proxy stability checks.
